0.2.0.en: Initial beta with local SoundTouch discovery, six configurable presets, physical preset handling, Homey controls, Flow actions, native preset name sync, and playback diagnostics.

0.3.0.en: First beta version of SoundTouch Bridge - Fixed icons and added social links

0.4.0.en: New app icon and redesigned App Store and device images, dedicated Flow card icons, and a cleaner device settings page. Debug logging and live diagnostics now live in the app settings under "Show debug info". Extended the store description.

0.4.2.en: New driver image: a clean line-art illustration of the speaker on a white background. The App Store images use the same illustration on the dark gradient for a consistent look.
